title: Kaattu vazhi pora ponney Lyrics Mambatiyan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Lyrics : Vairamuthu
Singer(s) : - Version 1 - Naveen
                    Version 2 - Thiagarajan
                    Remix - Simbu

Kaattu vazhi pora penney
Kavala padadhey,
Kaattu Puli Vazhi marikkum...
Kalangi nikkaadhey (2)

Mambattiyan peru sonna
puli udhavum paaru
Enga Mambattiyan peru sonna
puli udhavum paaru   (Kaattu vazhi......)

8-tu thala vetti vachaan
sandhayila kotti vachaan
kodumaya katti vachaan
verrena micham vachaan
Mullu mela thaan paduthaan
ezhaikellaam poo virichaan
Aththi malapaara innum pesudhavan pera
Andha, Aththi malapaara
innum pesudhavan pera (Kaattu vazhi......)

Kannaatha vazha vandhaa, Mambattiyaan kooda vandhaa
Thaalikava aasai pattaa, thunbathuku vaaka pattaa
Sorgathuku serndhu vara, utharavu vaangiputta
Enna kadhaiyaachu ava idupodinja naathu
Emmaa, Enna kadhaiyaachu
ava idupodinja naathu (Kaattu vazhi......)

Thangam pola varrnamadi, ullikotta sornamadi
Pathupera paatha padi,pathinithaan mathapadi
Mambatiyaan saagayila thaan uysura vitavadi
Maadhaviya pirandha ava kannagiya irandhaa
Maadhaviya pirandha ava kannagiya irandhaa (Kaattu vazhi......)

Mambattiyaan Peru solla naavu konjam koosu dhada
5-u mara thoppu kulla aavi vandhu pesudhada
Mambattiyaan veeram enga saathi sanam kaakumada
Mambattiyaan pechu adhu seema varapochu
Enga, Mambattiyaan pechu adhu seema varapochu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaattu vazhi pora ponney?

The song is about courage and adventure, reflecting the spirit of the protagonist in the movie Mambattiyan.

Who composed the music for Mambattiyan?

The music for Mambattiyan was composed by Thaman S.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kaattu vazhi pora ponney?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu.

When was the song Kaattu vazhi pora ponney released?

The song was released in the year 2011.

Who is the singer of Kaattu vazhi pora ponney?

The song is sung by Simbu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaattu vazhi pora ponney from the movie Mambattiyan is a powerful anthem that embodies the spirit of adventure and bravery. Sung by Simbu, the track is a motivational piece that encourages listeners to face challenges head-on. The lyrics by Vairamuthu beautifully capture the essence of the wild, while Thaman S's energetic composition adds to the song's dynamic feel. It serves as a theme for the protagonist's journey, evoking a sense of determination and resilience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the raw energy of Kaattu vazhi pora ponney from the movie Mambattiyan, where Simbu's powerful vocals meet Thaman S's dynamic composition. This song, penned by the legendary Vairamuthu, captures the essence of courage and adventure. Dive into the world of Mambattiyan and feel the pulse of the wild!
stanzaMeanings: Lyrics by Vairamuthu, sung by Naveen and Thiagarajan, remixed by Simbu.
Girl walking through the forest path, don't worry. The forest tiger will change its path... Don't stand confused.
When Mambattiyan's name is mentioned, even the tiger will help. See, when Mambattiyan's name is mentioned, even the tiger will help.

He cut off eight heads, fought in the evening, tied up cruelty, left nothing else. He lay on thorns, spread flowers for the poor. The name of the one who still speaks in Aththi Malapaara. The name of the one who still speaks in Aththi Malapaara.

If you come to live without fear, Mambattiyan will come with you. If you desire a wedding chain, you will face sorrow. To reach heaven, you need permission. What happened to the girl who tied her waist? What happened to the girl who tied her waist?

Like gold in color, like golden onions. Ten people saw her, but only twelve understood. Mambattiyan died, but his spirit lives on. Was she born as Maadhavi or did she die as Kannagi? Was she born as Maadhavi or did she die as Kannagi?

When Mambattiyan's name is mentioned, the tongue hesitates a bit. Inside the grove of five trees, the spirit speaks. Mambattiyan's bravery protects our community. Mambattiyan's words have reached the region. Mambattiyan's words have reached the region.
Girl walking through the forest path...
